_comment_location: This file is the single source of truth for venue metadata consumed
by both surfaces (cafe-sativa.com and mall.truskool.net). It lives in
the mall repo for now; cafe-sativa.com should fetch it from
or via a sync script. Bump `version` whenever the file changes; both
apps should cache-bust on version change.

tiers.name: Explorer
tiers.description: Full access to the venue, host chat with Laviche, browse events and merch. Pay per event at walk-up price.

tiers.name: Regular
tiers.description: All events free. 10% off merch. Event recordings kept forever. Host remembers you across visits.

tiers.name: VIP
tiers.description: Everything in Regular plus Cigar Lounge access, 20% off merch, priority ticketing, and first dibs on the Tenerife physical venue when it opens.

rooms.label: Entrance Foyer
rooms.short_description: Warm oak, cream walls, a host stand to your right.

rooms.label: Gallery Atrium
rooms.short_description: Double-height travertine atrium. Art and NFTs on the walls.

rooms.label: Cocktail Bar
rooms.short_description: Horseshoe bar, bottle wall, charcoal walls, amber light.

rooms.label: Main Lounge
rooms.short_description: Sage walls, 6m ceiling. Scattered seating by day, stage by night.

rooms.label: Cold Stoned
rooms.short_description: Bright white tile, gelato case, natural daylight.

rooms.label: Courtyard
rooms.short_description: Open-air stone pavers, palms, string lights overhead.

rooms.label: Cigar Airlock
rooms.short_description: Narrow dark vestibule. Velvet rope. Members only past here.

rooms.label: Cigar Lounge
rooms.short_description: Dark walnut, forest-green leather, low 3m ceiling. Intimate.

rooms.label: Back of House
rooms.short_description: Staff corridor. Industrial gray walls. Not for guests.

rooms.label: Culinary Theater
rooms.short_description: Behind the stage. Demo kitchen with subway tile and copper hood.

laviche.persona_summary: Luxury lifestyle host. Warm, knowing, remembers faces. Speaks in soft confidence, not over-polished — reads the room. Laviche runs the Café Sativa floor.

ginger.persona_summary: Adventure traveler. Knowing, slightly mischievous. Talks about places like she's been there — because the persona has been. Ginger covers Wanderlust (travel brand) and is the backup host for travel-adjacent questions on Café Sativa.

ahnika.persona_summary: Alignment coach meets stylist. Thoughtful, grounded, tasteful. Handles Faithfully Faded and H.O.E. Speaks to intention behind a purchase, not just the item.

stripe._note: customer_portal_url populated after Stripe Customer Portal is configured in Stripe Dashboard

event_platform._zoom_note: Episode 1 uses Zoom for simplicity. events.zoom_join_url is populated ~24h before each event and included in the ticket confirmation email. Revisit LiveKit after Ep 1.

rate_limits._note: Enforced in the mint-agent-call Edge Function before forwarding to Railway orchestrator. Hitting limit returns a polite close-out message, not a hard 429.

cross_surface_memory._description: How far back a host agent can reference past conversations when building prompt context. Only surfaced when contextually relevant — never unprompted.
cross_surface_memory._creepy_rule: Agents reference past context only when the current question is relevant. 'You mentioned jazz last time; Friday works?' = OK. 'I notice you didn't finish checkout' = NOT OK.
